name: Iso11783PDDSetValue
title: Iso11783PDDSetValue
syntax: long Iso11783PDDSetValue( dword ecuHandle, dbSignal signal, dword elementNumber, float alue );
long Iso11783PDDSetValue( dword ecuHandle, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, float value );
description: Sets the value of a process variable.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU. The handle must previously have been created with Iso11783CreateECU.

parameters.name: signal
parameters.description: Signal from the database. The attribute ddi must have been defined for the signal. The signal must be defined in the same database as the node!

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: New value of the process variable

example.code:
Iso11783PDDSetValue( Sprayer, 0x200. 3, value );
Iso11783PDDSetValue( Sprayer, 0x200. 4, value );

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
